preReview.title: CF Montreal v New England Revolution: Porter aiming to end road-heavy stretch on a high
preReview.description: CF Montreal welcome the New England Revolution to the Stade Saputo this weekend, aiming to get a much-needed win on the board.

QAData.question: Who won between CF Montreal and New England Revolution on Sat, 31 May 2025 23:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: New England Revolution won 3–0 over CF Montreal on Sat, 31 May 2025 23:30:00 GMT.
